channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Rep. Jason Smith: Congress Must Address Social Security
item.description: The House Ways and Means Committee chairman stated Wednesday that Congress needs to act immediately to prevent an anticipated shortfall in Social Security's primary fund.

item.title: THE ESSEX FILES: Faith Under Fire: Why America's Churches Are Becoming Armed Fortresses
Europeans Fall in Love With America While Touring the Country; Americans Should Take Notes
Missouri senator warns Democrat immigration policies threaten Western civilization after securing ICE funding win
item.description: Sen. Schmitt argues that Democrat immigration policies endanger Western civilization, following his $350 million ICE funding provision targeting sanctuary cities.
